articles.title: 'They should have given him a royal send-off' - Kris Srikkanth on Virat Kohli's Test retirement
articles.description: The talismanic Kohli retired from the format ahead of the 2025 series in England. He has scored 9,230 runs in 123 Tests at an average of 46.85 with 30 centuries.
